content: agent2: implementing 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method.

Both pop from params dict before encoderinfo assignment (like save_all), so should merge cleanly with your dry_run addition as long as you follow the same pattern (params.pop(...) near save_all line ~2546, and use logic near created/open_fp block line ~2571). Let me know when you push so I can merge.
